ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. JAMES A. LASSART, ESQ. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (Tel: 415-788-1900) appearing for the petitioners;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS TAMRA SELVITELLA, RONALD PALLA, JERRY SELVITELLLA, AND SUZANNE SELVITELLLA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter is submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petition is granted. No opposition filed.

A judgment is signed in open court. Petitioners' counsel is instructed to submit a proposed order to the Court today by e-mail.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ADRIAN G. DRISCOLL, ESQ. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (Tel: 415-788-1900) appearing for petitioners;
No other appearances made.

Petitioners do not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tenative ruling as follows: Petitioners Tamra Selvitella, Ronald Palla, Jerry Selvitellla, and Suzanne Selvitellla's petition for order compelling arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. FORMAL ORDER SIGNED.

The Court addresses/clarifies with petitioners' counsel an issue concerning the correct title caption for this case.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. (302/HK)
